title: Determinant of a 2x2 matrix
description: Find the determinant of a given 2x2 matrix.

assessment_items.question_content:
$\text D = \left[\begin{array}{rr}-2 & -2 \\ -1 & 1\end{array}\right]$

** What is the determinant of $\text D$? **

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
The determinant of a 2x2 matrix can be computed the following way: 

  $ \left|\begin{array}{rr}a & b \\ c & d\end{array}\right| = (a \times d)-(b \times c) $

In this specific case,

  $ \left|\begin{array}{rr}-2 & -2 \\ -1 & 1\end{array}\right| = (-2 \cdot 1)-(-2 \cdot -1) $

assessment_items.question_content:
$\text A = \left[\begin{array}{rr}-2 & 5 \\ 4 & 3\end{array}\right]$

** What is the determinant of $\text A$? **

hints:
The determinant of a 2x2 matrix can be computed the following way: 

  $ \left|\begin{array}{rr}a & b \\ c & d\end{array}\right| = (a \times d)-(b \times c) $

In this specific case,

  $ \left|\begin{array}{rr}-2 & 5 \\ 4 & 3\end{array}\right| = (-2 \cdot 3)-(5 \cdot 4) $

In this specific case,

  $ \left|\begin{array}{rr}-1 & -2 \\ -2 & -1\end{array}\right| = (-1 \cdot -1)-(-2 \cdot -2) $
